desc.zh: 使角色在战斗中自动行动，不受玩家控制。通常设置为1以启用。
desc.en: Makes the character act automatically in battle, without player control. Usually set to 1 to enable.

desc.zh: 治疗一个随机的伤势。数值表示治疗伤势的数量。通常在战斗开始或结束时触发。
desc.en: Heals a random injury. The value represents the number of injuries to heal. Usually triggers at the start or end of battle.

desc.zh: 使角色免疫指定的状态效果。可以是一个状态名称或一个状态名称的数组。参考值：Madness
desc.en: Makes the character immune to the specified status effect(s). Can be a single status name or an array of status names. Seen values: 'Madness', ['Madness', 'PermanentMadness']

desc.zh: 战斗结束时自动拾取战场上所有的掉落物。可设置为对象`{'pop_corpses': true}`来额外爆开所有尸体。
desc.en: Automatically collects all pickups on the battlefield at the end of battle. Can be an object `{pop_corpses: true}` to also pop all corpses.

desc.zh: 战斗结束时治疗一个随机的伤势。数值表示治疗伤势的数量。
desc.en: Heals a random injury at the end of battle. The value represents the number of injuries to heal.

desc.zh: 使角色在被击倒时不会获得伤势。通常设置为1以启用。
desc.en: Prevents the character from getting an injury when downed. Usually set to 1 to enable.

title.zh: 战斗结束时获得随机变异
title.en: Gain Random Mutation on Battle End

desc.zh: 战斗结束时随机获得一个变异（疾病或特性）。数值表示获得的数量。
desc.en: Gains a random mutation (disorder or trait) at the end of battle. The value represents the quantity.

desc.zh: 当角色的尸体被摧毁时，会生成一个继承其技能的小猫克隆体。通常设置为1以启用。
desc.en: When the character's corpse is destroyed, spawns a kitten clone that inherits its abilities. Usually set to 1 to enable.

desc.zh: 每当角色受到治疗效果时，额外治疗一个随机伤势。数值表示治疗伤势的数量。
desc.en: Whenever the character is healed, also heal a random injury. The value represents the number of injuries to heal.

desc.zh: 战斗结束时将生命值完全恢复。通常设置为1以启用。
desc.en: Fully restores health at the end of battle. Usually set to 1 to enable.

desc.zh: 允许角色在升级时获得指定职业的技能。这是一个枚举类型。
desc.en: Allows the character to be offered abilities from the specified class upon level up. This is an enum type.

desc.zh: 为基础攻击附加腐烂效果的层数。参考值：1.0 (1层), -999999.0 (永久)。
desc.en: Adds stacks of Rot to the basic attack. Seen values: 1.0 (1 stack), -999999.0 (permanent).

desc.zh: 允许生命值超过最大值。通常设置为1.0来启用此效果。
desc.en: Allows HP to exceed its maximum. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 每N点溢出的生命值，获得1点力量。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: For every N points of HP over the max, gain +1 Strength. Seen value: 5.0.

desc.zh: 提升你生成的食物和废料拾取物的大小等级。参考值：1.0 (变大), 2.0 (最大)。
desc.en: Increases the size level of food and scrap pickups you spawn. Seen values: 1.0 (bigger), 2.0 (max size).

desc.zh: 吃食物时获得的力量点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Strength points gained when eating food. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 吃食物时获得随机属性
title.en: Gain Random Stat on Eat Food

desc.zh: 吃食物时获得的随机属性点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Random stat points gained when eating food. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 受击时随机池获得力量
title.en: Gain Strength from Pool on Took Damage

desc.zh: 受击时，从随机池中获得力量的权重/点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Weight/points for gaining Strength from a random pool when taking damage. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 受击时随机池获得体质
title.en: Gain Constitution from Pool on Took Damage

desc.zh: 受击时，从随机池中获得体质的权重/点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Weight/points for gaining Constitution from a random pool when taking damage. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 受击时随机池获得速度
title.en: Gain Speed from Pool on Took Damage

desc.zh: 受击时，从随机池中获得速度的权重/点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Weight/points for gaining Speed from a random pool when taking damage. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 每次受到伤害时获得的力量点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Strength points gained each time damage is taken. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 每次受到伤害时获得的体质点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Constitution points gained each time damage is taken. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 每次受到伤害时获得的速度点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Speed points gained each time damage is taken. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 附近单位移动时触发能力

desc.zh: 当带特定标签的单位移动到附近时触发的能力名称。参考值：'move'。
desc.en: Name of the ability to trigger when a tagged character moves nearby. Seen value: 'move'.

title.zh: 附近单位移动时触发标签

desc.zh: 要检测的单位标签。参考值：'food'。
desc.en: The tag of the character to detect. Seen value: 'food'.

title.zh: 附近单位移动时触发范围

desc.zh: 触发的范围。可以是数字或'global'。参考值：2.0, 'global'。
desc.en: The trigger range. Can be a number or 'global'. Seen values: 2.0, 'global'.

desc.zh: 拥有践踏能力，并设定基础伤害值。参考值：3.0。
desc.en: Grants the Trample ability and sets its base damage. Seen value: 3.0.

desc.zh: 每回合额外的武器攻击次数。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Additional weapon attacks per turn. Seen value: 2.0.

desc.zh: 增加武器的基础伤害。参考值：1.0, 2.0, 5.0。
desc.en: Increases the base damage of the weapon. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0, 5.0.

desc.zh: 为武器攻击附加顺劈效果。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Adds Cleave effect to weapon attacks. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 战斗开始时获得的额外移动次数。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Bonus movement actions at the start of battle. Seen value: 2.0.

desc.zh: 为践踏伤害附加顺劈效果。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Adds Cleave effect to trample damage. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 为武器攻击附加流血效果的层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Adds stacks of Bleed to weapon attacks. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 使武器具有抓钩效果，将使用者拉向免疫击退的目标。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Gives weapons a grapple effect, pulling the user towards knockback-immune targets. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 当武器命中时，刷新移动动作。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Refreshes movement action when a weapon connects. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

title.en: Gain Temp Damage on Took Damage

desc.zh: 每次受到伤害时获得的临时伤害点数。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Temporary damage points gained each time damage is taken. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

desc.zh: 每次受到伤害时获得的永久伤害点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Permanent damage points gained each time damage is taken. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 将角色的基础攻击替换为指定的其他攻击能力。参考值：'BasicButcherMeleeWideSpin', 'BasicButcherMeleeWideDoubleSpin'。
desc.en: Replaces the character's basic attack with a different specified attack ability. Seen values: 'BasicButcherMeleeWideSpin', 'BasicButcherMeleeWideDoubleSpin'.

desc.zh: 当受到伤害时，用何种移动能力移向伤害源。参考值：'TrampleMoveOne', 'TrampleMove'。
desc.en: The movement ability to use when moving towards a damage source. Seen values: 'TrampleMoveOne', 'TrampleMove'.

desc.zh: 允许钩子瞄准地块。数值可能影响效果等级。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Allows the hook to target tiles. The value may affect the effect level. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

desc.zh: 在特定条件下装备一个临时物品。参考值：'ButcherHook_Temporary'。
desc.en: Equips a temporary item under certain conditions. Seen value: 'ButcherHook_Temporary'.

desc.zh: 当附近有单位移动时，触发的反应能力。参考值：'weapon' (使用武器)。
desc.en: The ability to trigger in reaction to nearby movement. Seen value: 'weapon'.

desc.zh: 魅惑战场上所有的苍蝇单位。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Charms all fly units on the battlefield. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 增加所有苍蝇单位的伤害。参考值：1.0, 4.0。
desc.en: Increases the damage of all fly units. Seen values: 1.0, 4.0.

desc.zh: 指定一个状态效果，每当你施加该效果时，其层数会增加。参考值：'Rot'。
desc.en: Specify a status effect. Whenever you apply it, its stacks are increased. Seen value: 'Rot'.

desc.zh: 当产生过量治疗时获得的力量点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Strength points gained when over-healed. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 过量治疗时获得武器伤害

desc.zh: 当产生过量治疗时获得的当前武器伤害加成。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Current weapon damage bonus gained when over-healed. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 受到伤害时生成的物品ID。参考值：'Food'。
desc.en: The ID of the object to spawn when taking damage. Seen value: 'Food'.

desc.zh: 移动时生成的物品ID。参考值：'Food'。
desc.en: The ID of the object to spawn when moving. Seen value: 'Food'.

title.zh: 对护盾单位暴击率加成

desc.zh: 普攻对有护盾的敌人时的额外暴击率。参考值：100.0 (即100%)。
desc.en: Bonus critical hit chance for basic attacks against shielded enemies. Seen value: 100.0 (i.e., 100%).

desc.zh: 普攻暴击时，为目标附加驱散效果。通常设置为0.0来启用。
desc.en: Applies Purge to the target on a basic attack crit. Typically set to 0.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 增加暴击伤害的倍率。输入一个带%的字符串。参考值：'100%', '50%'。
desc.en: Increases critical hit damage multiplier. Input as a string with '%'. Seen values: '100%', '50%'.

desc.zh: 为光环范围内的友军提供一个额外的能力。参考值：'Bowl', 'Bowl2'。
desc.en: Grants a bonus ability to allies within the aura. Seen values: 'Bowl', 'Bowl2'.

desc.zh: 设置光环范围为方形（包含对角线）。通常设置为 true。
desc.en: Sets the aura range to a square (including diagonals). Usually set to true.

desc.zh: 为角色添加一个隐藏的标签，用于其他能力的逻辑判断。参考值：'bowling_ball'。
desc.en: Adds a hidden tag to the character for logical checks by other abilities. Seen value: 'bowling_ball'.

title.zh: 受击时获得临时移动力
title.en: Gain Temp Movement on Took Damage

desc.zh: 受到伤害时获得的临时移动范围加成（持续到回合结束）。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Temporary movement range bonus gained on taking damage (lasts until end of turn). Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 受到伤害时获得的永久移动范围加成。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Permanent movement range bonus gained on taking damage. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 过量治疗时强制使用能力

desc.zh: 当产生过量治疗时，强制使用一个指定的能力。参考值：'Indigestion_Fart', 'Indigestion_Fart2'。
desc.en: Forces the use of a specified ability when over-healed. Seen values: 'Indigestion_Fart', 'Indigestion_Fart2'.

title.zh: 过量治疗时生成缩放腐蝇
title.en: Spawn Scaled Rot Fly on Over-Heal

desc.zh: 过量治疗时生成腐蝇。0.0表示标准生成, 1.0表示根据过量治疗量缩放属性。
desc.en: Spawns a rot fly on over-heal. 0.0 for standard spawn, 1.0 to scale its stats with the heal amount.

desc.zh: 战斗结束时将食物拾取物转为友方苍蝇，并可带到下场战斗。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Converts food pickups to allied flies at the end of battle, which persist. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 普攻命中时生成一个弹跳的物体/单位。参考值：'AllyRotFly'。
desc.en: Spawns a bouncing object/unit on basic attack hit. Seen value: 'AllyRotFly'.

desc.zh: 每次击杀单位时获得的随机属性点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Random stat points gained each time a unit is killed. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 每次击杀单位时获得的全属性提升点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: All stats up points gained each time a unit is killed. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 任意单位死亡时获得幸运

desc.zh: 任何单位（敌/我）死亡时获得的幸运点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Luck points gained when any unit (enemy/ally) dies. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 每次击杀单位时获得的幸运点数。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Luck points gained each time a unit is killed. Seen value: 2.0.

desc.zh: 每回合结束时生成的物体ID。可以是单个ID或ID数组。参考值：'CharmedFlea', 'CharmedMaggot', ['CharmedTumorousMaggot', ...]
desc.en: ID of the object to spawn at the end of each turn. Can be a single ID or an array of IDs. Seen values: 'CharmedFlea', 'CharmedMaggot', ['CharmedTumorousMaggot', ...]

desc.zh: 每回合生成物体的数量。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Number of objects to spawn each turn. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 每回合生成物体的几率（0到1之间）。参考值：0.5。
desc.en: Chance to spawn an object each turn (from 0 to 1). Seen value: 0.5.

desc.zh: 战斗开始时生成的物体ID。可以是单个ID或ID数组。参考值：'CharmedFlea'。
desc.en: ID of the object to spawn at the start of battle. Can be a single ID or an array of IDs. Seen value: 'CharmedFlea'.

desc.zh: 战斗开始时生成物体的数量。可以是固定值或一个[min, max]数组。参考值：[2.0, 3.0]。
desc.en: Number of objects to spawn at the start of battle. Can be a fixed value or a [min, max] array. Seen value: [2.0, 3.0].

desc.zh: 每回合结束时获得的速度点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Speed points gained at the end of each turn. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 每回合可以额外移动的次数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Number of extra times you can move per turn. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 每次造成暴击时获得的伤害加成。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Damage bonus gained each time you land a critical hit. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 增加暴击率（百分点）。参考值：5.0, 25.0。
desc.en: Increases critical hit chance (percentage points). Seen values: 5.0, 25.0.

desc.zh: 每次造成暴击时获得的暴击率加成（百分点）。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: Crit chance bonus (percentage points) gained each time you land a critical hit. Seen value: 5.0.

desc.zh: 增加你死亡后尸体的生命值。参考值：3.0, 96.0。负值可使其立即消失。
desc.en: Increases the health of your corpse after death. Seen values: 3.0, 96.0. A negative value can make it disappear instantly.

desc.zh: 移动时在脚下生成金币的几率（百分比）。参考值：5.0, 10.0。
desc.en: Chance (as a percentage) to spawn a coin underfoot when moving. Seen values: 5.0, 10.0.

desc.zh: 在被击倒后，每回合结束时复活的几率（百分比）。参考值：25.0, 33.0。
desc.en: Chance (as a percentage) to revive at the end of each round after being downed. Seen values: 25.0, 33.0.

desc.zh: 通过几率复活时获得的全属性提升点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: All stats up points gained when reviving by chance. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 通过几率复活时恢复的生命值。参考值：10.0。
desc.en: Health restored when reviving by chance. Seen value: 10.0.

desc.zh: 为附近友军提供伤害加成。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Provides a damage bonus to nearby allies. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 为附近友军提供攻击范围加成。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Provides a range bonus to nearby allies. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 为所有友军提供伤害加成。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Provides a damage bonus to all allies. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 为所有友军提供攻击范围加成。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Provides a range bonus to all allies. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 当受到近战攻击时，对攻击者施加中毒的层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Stacks of Poison to apply to the attacker upon being hit by a melee attack. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 当受到近战攻击时，对攻击者施加流血的层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Stacks of Bleed to apply to the attacker upon being hit by a melee attack. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 当受到近战攻击时，对攻击者施加瘀伤的层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Stacks of Bruise to apply to the attacker upon being hit by a melee attack. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 当受到近战攻击时，对攻击者施加虚弱的层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Stacks of Weakness to apply to the attacker upon being hit by a melee attack. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 当受到近战攻击时，对攻击者施加水蛭的层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Stacks of Leeches to apply to the attacker upon being hit by a melee attack. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 增加未填充的生命上限

desc.zh: 战斗开始时增加最大生命值，但不填充。参考值：20.0, 50.0。
desc.en: Increases max health at the start of battle, but doesn't fill it. Seen values: 20.0, 50.0.

desc.zh: 你对友军造成的伤害将被完全减免。通常设置为0.0。
desc.en: Damage you deal to allies is completely reduced. Usually set to 0.0.

desc.zh: 武器不会损失耐久度。通常设置为0.0。
desc.en: Weapons will not lose durability. Usually set to 0.0.

desc.zh: 增加闪避几率。输入一个带%的字符串。参考值：'25%'。
desc.en: Increases dodge chance. Input as a string with '%'. Seen value: '25%'.

desc.zh: 免疫背刺的额外伤害。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Immunity to bonus damage from backstabs. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 免疫负面地块效果。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Immunity to negative tile effects. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 防止对友军施加负面状态。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Prevents applying debuffs to allies. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 对中毒或流血的敌人攻击时，会额外施加+1层对应的状态。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: When attacking Poisoned or Bleeding enemies, apply +1 stack of the corresponding status. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 为基础攻击附加中毒效果的层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Adds stacks of Poison to the basic attack. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 在第N回合时触发晚熟效果。参考值：5.0, 3.0。
desc.en: The turn number on which the Late Bloomer effect triggers. Seen values: 5.0, 3.0.

desc.zh: 触发晚熟效果时获得的全属性提升点数。参考值：3.0。
desc.en: All stats up points gained when the Late Bloomer effect triggers. Seen value: 3.0.

desc.zh: 攻击新类型单位时获得智力。1.0为基础效果, 对象值可添加'marked'来标记同类敌人。
desc.en: Gain Intelligence when hitting a new unit type. 1.0 for base effect, object value can add 'marked' to mark similar enemies.

desc.zh: 增加每回合的生命恢复量。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Increases health regeneration per turn. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

desc.zh: 为附近友军提供生命再生。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Provides health regeneration to nearby allies. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 增加角色的攻击射程。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Increases the character's attack range. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

desc.zh: 增加远程攻击的暴击率。输入一个带%的字符串。参考值：'25%'。
desc.en: Increases critical hit chance for ranged attacks. Input as a string with '%'. Seen value: '25%'.

desc.zh: 允许穿过单位和物体。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows movement through units and objects. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 永久增加角色的基础伤害。参考值：1.0, 3.0, 4.0。
desc.en: Permanently increases the character's base damage. Seen values: 1.0, 3.0, 4.0.

desc.zh: 击杀单位或摧毁尸体时，将其变为指定的物品。参考值：'Food'。
desc.en: When killing a unit or destroying a corpse, it becomes the specified item. Seen value: 'Food'.

desc.zh: 增加法术造成的伤害。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Increases the damage dealt by spells. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 每N点魅力，增加1点法术伤害。参考值：3.0。
desc.en: For every N points of Charisma, gain +1 spell damage. Seen value: 3.0.

desc.zh: 当你被击倒时，为所有友军提供全属性提升。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: When you are downed, grant all allies an All Stats Up buff. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

title.zh: 死亡时治疗友军(溢出转盾)
title.en: Heal Allies on Death (Overflow to Shield)

desc.zh: 当你被击倒时，治疗所有友军，溢出部分转为护盾。参考值：12.0, 20.0。
desc.en: When you are downed, heal all allies, with overflow converted to shield. Seen values: 12.0, 20.0.

desc.zh: 当生命值全满时，获得的暴击率加成。参考值：100.0 (即100%)。
desc.en: Bonus critical hit chance when at full health. Seen value: 100.0 (i.e., 100%).

desc.zh: 当生命值全满时，获得的全属性提升。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: All stats up bonus when at full health. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 当生命值全满时，获得的法力恢复加成。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: Mana regeneration bonus when at full health. Seen value: 5.0.

desc.zh: 使小型敌人不会主动攻击你。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Causes small enemies to not attack you. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 受到攻击时，对攻击者施加恐惧。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Applies Fear to the attacker when hit. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 对友军造成伤害时：伤害提升

desc.zh: 当你对友军造成伤害时，为其提供伤害提升。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: When you damage an ally, grant them a Damage Up buff. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 对友军造成伤害时：速度提升

desc.zh: 当你对友军造成伤害时，为其提供速度提升。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: When you damage an ally, grant them a Speed Up buff. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 当你的攻击伤害低于或等于此数值时，必定暴击。参考值：2.0, 3.0。
desc.en: When your damage is less than or equal to this value, it will always be a critical hit. Seen values: 2.0, 3.0.

desc.zh: 在特定条件下（如受击）触发一个指定的能力。参考值：'Gassy_AssBlast', 'Gassy_AssBlast2'。
desc.en: Triggers a specified ability under certain conditions (like being hit). Seen values: 'Gassy_AssBlast', 'Gassy_AssBlast2'.

desc.zh: 允许你在任何位置对其他单位使用消耗品。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows you to use consumables on other units from any distance. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 为你使用的消耗品效果提供一个额外的乘数。1.0代表效果翻倍。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Provides an additional multiplier for the effects of consumables you use. 1.0 means double effect. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 允许玩家选择跳过回合以换取回合结束时的额外回合。0.0表示跳过会损失法力恢复，1.0则不会。
desc.en: Allows passing a turn for an extra turn at the end of the round. 0.0 means passing loses mana regen, 1.0 does not.

desc.zh: 设置所有基础属性的最低值，不能低于此值。参考值：5.0, 7.0。
desc.en: Sets a minimum value for all base stats; they cannot go lower. Seen values: 5.0, 7.0.

title.zh: 移除每场战斗一次限制

desc.zh: 将“每场战斗一次”的技能限制改为“每回合一次”。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Changes 'once per battle' ability restrictions to 'once per turn'. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 使用“每回合一次”的技能后，有几率返还使用次数。输入一个带%的字符串。参考值：'50%'。
desc.en: Chance to refund a use of a 'once per turn' ability after using it. Input as a string with '%'. Seen value: '50%'.

title.zh: N次击杀后触发被动：击杀数
title.en: Passive After X Kills: Kill Count

desc.zh: 需要达到的击杀数才能触发被动。参考值：3.0。
desc.en: The number of kills required to trigger the passive. Seen value: 3.0.

title.zh: N次击杀后触发被动：速度提升
title.en: Passive After X Kills: Speed Up

desc.zh: 达到击杀数后获得的速度提升。参考值：6.0。
desc.en: Speed bonus gained after reaching the kill count. Seen value: 6.0.

title.zh: N次击杀后触发被动：背刺暴击
title.en: Passive After X Kills: Backstab Crit

desc.zh: 达到击杀数后，背刺的暴击率。1.0代表100%。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Backstab critical hit chance after reaching the kill count. 1.0 means 100%. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: N次击杀后触发被动：额外普攻
title.en: Passive After X Kills: Extra Basic Attacks

desc.zh: 达到击杀数后，每回合获得的额外普攻次数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Extra basic attacks per turn gained after reaching the kill count. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 为每个友方宠物提供伤害加成，数值等于其他友方宠物的数量。可设置为`{ 'count_self': true }`使自己也加入计算。
desc.en: Grants each familiar a damage bonus equal to the number of other familiars. Can be set to `{ 'count_self': true }` to include self in the count.

desc.zh: 强制升级时只提供指定职业的技能。参考值：'Jester' (小丑), 'Colorless' (无色)。
desc.en: Forces level-up ability offerings to be from a specific class. Seen values: 'Jester', 'Colorless'.

desc.zh: 增加升级时可用的重摇次数。参考值：2.0, 99.0。
desc.en: Increases the number of available rerolls during level up. Seen value: 2.0, 99.0.

desc.zh: 允许储存未使用的普攻次数到后续回合，或在战斗开始时获得额外攻击次数。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Allows storing unused basic attacks for later turns, or grants bonus attacks at battle start. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

desc.zh: 击杀单位时恢复生命值。可以是固定数值或百分比字符串。参考值：5.0, '50%'。
desc.en: Restores health upon killing a unit. Can be a fixed number or a percentage string. Seen values: 5.0, '50%'.

desc.zh: 对曾伤害过你的敌人攻击时必定暴击。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Attacks against enemies that have damaged you are always critical. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 为普攻附加“狂怒”效果，有几率多次攻击。数值为几率。参考值：75.0。
desc.en: Adds 'Fury' effect to basic attacks, with a chance to attack multiple times. The value is the chance. Seen value: 75.0.

desc.zh: 增加武器的基础伤害。参考值：2.0, 3.0。
desc.en: Increases the base damage of the weapon. Seen values: 2.0, 3.0.

desc.zh: 增加武器的暴击率。输入0-1之间的小数。参考值：0.25, 0.5。
desc.en: Increases the weapon's critical hit chance. Input a decimal between 0 and 1. Seen values: 0.25, 0.5.

title.zh: 从池中装备随机临时物品
title.en: Equip Random Temp Item from Pool

desc.zh: 在特定条件下，从指定的物品池中随机装备一个临时物品。参考值：'weapons'。
desc.en: Under certain conditions, equips a random temporary item from a specified pool. Seen value: 'weapons'.

desc.zh: 移动后如果正对敌人，则自动攻击，造成普攻伤害的一定百分比。输入一个带%的字符串。参考值：'33%', '100%'。
desc.en: After moving, if facing an enemy, automatically attack for a percentage of basic attack damage. Input as a string with '%'. Seen values: '33%', '100%'.

desc.zh: 为基础攻击附加瘀伤效果的层数。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Adds stacks of Bruise to the basic attack. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

desc.zh: 增加基础攻击的范围效果。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Increases the area of effect for the basic attack. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

desc.zh: 调整基础攻击的伤害倍率。输入一个带%的字符串。参考值：'50%'。
desc.en: Adjusts the damage multiplier for the basic attack. Input as a string with '%'. Seen value: '50%'.

desc.zh: 调整地块造成的伤害和效果倍率。可以设置为对象`{'multiplier': 2.0, 'ally_multiplier': 0.0}`来区别敌我。
desc.en: Adjusts the damage and effect multiplier of tiles. Can be an object `{'multiplier': 2.0, 'ally_multiplier': 0.0}` to differentiate.

desc.zh: 调整你放置的陷阱所造成伤害和效果的倍率。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Adjusts the damage and effect multiplier of traps you place. Seen value: 2.0.

desc.zh: 使友军不会触发你放置的陷阱。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Prevents allies from triggering your traps. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 普攻每超过最小距离一格，增加的伤害点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Damage points added for each tile the basic attack travels beyond the minimum range. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 普攻距离伤害：最小距离
title.en: Basic Attack Distance Bonus: Min Range

desc.zh: 开始计算距离伤害加成的最小距离。参考值：1.0, 3.0。
desc.en: The minimum range from which to start calculating the distance damage bonus. Seen values: 1.0, 3.0.

desc.zh: 使你的远程攻击不会失手。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Makes your ranged attacks never miss. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

title.zh: 将友军邻近格加入攻击范围
title.en: Add Ally Neighbors to Attack Range

desc.zh: 允许你的普攻可以目标友军邻近的地块。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows your basic attack to target tiles adjacent to allies. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

title.zh: 将友军邻近格加入技能范围
title.en: Add Ally Neighbors to Ability Range

desc.zh: 允许你的技能可以目标友军邻近的地块。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows your abilities to target tiles adjacent to allies. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 增加攻击的失手几率（百分点）。参考值：25.0。
desc.en: Increases the chance for an attack to miss (percentage points). Seen value: 25.0.

desc.zh: 使你装备的寄生生物物品可以被自由卸下。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows parasite items you equip to be unequipped freely. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

title.en: Add Charm to First Basic Attack

desc.zh: 每场战斗的第一次普攻附加魅惑效果的层数。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: Adds stacks of Charm to the first basic attack of each battle. Seen value: 5.0.

desc.zh: 为普攻附加魅惑效果，可以是一个[层数, 几率]的数组。参考值：[1.0, 0.25]。
desc.en: Adds a chance to apply Charm with basic attacks. Can be a [stacks, chance] array. Seen value: [1.0, 0.25].

desc.zh: 使普攻命中后强制目标攻击另一敌人，此效果有冷却。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Makes the basic attack force the target to attack another enemy, this effect has a cooldown. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

title.zh: 普攻条件性伤害或治疗

desc.zh: 使普攻能对敌人造成伤害，对友军进行治疗。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows the basic attack to damage enemies and heal allies. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

title.zh: 战斗开始时为友军装备物品
title.en: Equip Item for Allies on Battle Start

desc.zh: 战斗开始时，为所有友军装备一个指定的临时物品。参考值：'SleepDart', 'SleepDart2'。
desc.en: At the start of battle, equips all allies with a specified temporary item. Seen values: 'SleepDart', 'SleepDart2'.

desc.zh: 允许你在近战范围内对其他单位使用消耗品。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows you to use consumables on other units within melee range. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 战斗结束后额外储存的食物数量。参考值：2.0, 20.0。
desc.en: Amount of extra food to store at the end of each battle. Seen values: 2.0, 20.0.

title.zh: 回合结束根据击杀生成：数量
title.en: Spawn on Turn End per Kill: Stacks

desc.zh: 回合结束时，根据本场战斗的击杀数，每个击杀生成N个物体。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: At turn end, for each kill this battle, spawn N objects. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 回合结束根据击杀生成：物体
title.en: Spawn on Turn End per Kill: Object

desc.zh: 回合结束时，根据本场战斗的击杀数生成的物体ID。参考值：'CharmedFlea'。
desc.en: The ID of the object to spawn at turn end, based on kills this battle. Seen value: 'CharmedFlea'.

desc.zh: 回合结束时，固定生成的物体数量。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Fixed number of objects to spawn at turn end. Seen value: 2.0.

desc.zh: 回合结束时，固定生成的物体ID。参考值：'CharmedFlea'。
desc.en: The ID of the object to spawn at turn end. Seen value: 'CharmedFlea'.

desc.zh: 战斗结束时，需要达到的最低击杀数才能触发效果。参考值：3.0。
desc.en: The minimum number of kills required at the end of battle to trigger the effect. Seen value: 3.0.

title.zh: 满足条件时获得永久敏捷

desc.zh: 满足战斗结束击杀阈值后，获得的永久敏捷点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Permanent dexterity points gained after meeting the kill threshold at battle end. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 满足条件时从池中寻找物品
title.en: Find Item from Pool on Condition

desc.zh: 满足战斗结束击杀阈值后，从指定的物品池中寻找一个物品。参考值：'consumables', 'chapter'。
desc.en: After meeting the kill threshold, find an item from the specified pool. Seen values: 'consumables', 'chapter'.

desc.zh: 每N点敏捷，获得1点射程加成。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: For every N points of Dexterity, gain +1 range. Seen value: 5.0.

title.en: Bonus Health Regen Based on Dexterity

desc.zh: 每N点敏捷，获得1点生命再生。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: For every N points of Dexterity, gain +1 health regeneration. Seen value: 5.0.

desc.zh: 在每轮开始时获得额外的回合。负值可能代表其他逻辑。参考值：-1.0。
desc.en: Gain extra turns at the start of each round. A negative value may imply other logic. Seen value: -1.0.

desc.zh: 设置触发周期。参考值：3.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Sets the trigger period. Seen values: 3.0, 2.0.

title.en: Trigger Every N Turns: Divine Shield

desc.zh: 周期性获得的神圣护盾层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Number of Divine Shield stacks gained periodically. Seen value: 1.0.

title.en: Add Splash Damage to Basic Attack

desc.zh: 为普攻附加溅射伤害。数值为伤害量。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Adds splash damage to the basic attack. The value is the damage amount. Seen value: 2.0.

title.zh: 普攻附加大范围溅射伤害
title.en: Add Big Splash Damage to Basic Attack

desc.zh: 为普攻附加大范围的溅射伤害。数值为伤害量。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Adds wide-area splash damage to the basic attack. The value is the damage amount. Seen value: 2.0.

desc.zh: 为普攻附加元素属性。参考值：'Fire', 'Electric', 'Ice'。
desc.en: Adds elemental properties to the basic attack. Seen values: 'Fire', 'Electric', 'Ice'.

title.zh: 普攻时对自己施放随机魔弹
title.en: Self-Cast Random Magic Missile on Basic Attack

desc.zh: 使用普攻时，对自己发射随机数量的魔法飞弹（火花）。通常设置为1.0。
desc.en: When using basic attack, fire a random number of magic missiles (Sparkles) at oneself. Usually set to 1.0.

title.zh: 回合结束法力精确时触发：法力值
title.en: Trigger on Turn End if Mana Exact: Mana Value

desc.zh: 回合结束时，法力值需要精确等于此数值才能触发效果。参考值：0.0, 5.0, 2.0, 4.0。
desc.en: The exact mana value required at turn end to trigger the effect. Seen values: 0.0, 5.0, 2.0, 4.0.

title.zh: 回合结束法力精确时触发：免费法术
title.en: Trigger on Turn End if Mana Exact: Free Spell

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的免费法术次数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Number of free spell casts gained when the condition is met. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 回合结束法力精确时触发：法伤提升
title.en: Trigger on Turn End if Mana Exact: Spell Damage Up

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的法术伤害提升。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Spell damage bonus gained when the condition is met. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 被击倒时，在地图上触发寒冰效果。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Triggers a chill effect on the map when downed. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 战斗开始时增加的法力值。参考值：5.0, 20.0。
desc.en: Amount of mana added at the start of battle. Seen values: 5.0, 20.0.

desc.zh: 增加每回合的法力恢复量。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: Increases mana regeneration per turn. Seen value: 5.0.

desc.zh: 在每回合结束时将法力值清零。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Resets mana to zero at the end of each turn. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 每施放N个法术，下一个法术会施放两次。可设置为数字或对象 `{'period': 3.0, 'cycle_start': 2.0}`
desc.en: Every Nth spell cast, the next spell is cast twice. Can be a number or an object `{'period': 3.0, 'cycle_start': 2.0}`

desc.zh: 为角色赋予一个固有的元素属性。参考值：'Fire', 'Ice', 'Electric'。
desc.en: Grants the character an innate elemental property. Seen values: 'Fire', 'Ice', 'Electric'.

desc.zh: 使角色免疫指定的元素伤害。参考值：'Fire', 'Ice', 'Electric'。
desc.en: Makes the character immune to specified elemental damage. Seen values: 'Fire', 'Ice', 'Electric'.

desc.zh: 允许你的攻击可以伤害被冰冻的单位。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows your attacks to damage frozen units. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

title.en: Gain Temp Spell Damage After Cast

desc.zh: 施放法术后，在本回合内获得的临时法术伤害加成。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Temporary spell damage bonus gained for the rest of the turn after casting a spell. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 施放法术后，在本回合内获得的临时伤害加成。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Temporary damage bonus gained for the rest of the turn after casting a spell. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 为友军召唤所施放的法术

desc.zh: 当你施法时，所有友军都会获得该法术作为额外能力。1.0为原版, 2.0为升级版。
desc.en: When you cast a spell, all allies gain that spell as a bonus ability. 1.0 for original, 2.0 for upgraded version.

desc.zh: 造成电伤害时获得充能。0.0为固定+1充能, 1.0为每点伤害+1充能。
desc.en: Gain Charge when dealing Electric damage. 0.0 for a flat +1 Charge, 1.0 for +1 Charge per point of damage.

desc.zh: 增加指向地块的法术的施法距离。参考值：3.0, 5.0。
desc.en: Increases the cast range of tile-targeted spells. Seen values: 3.0, 5.0.

title.zh: 每回合结束根据回合数触发
title.en: Trigger on Turn End per Turn Count

desc.zh: 在回合结束时，根据已进行的回合数，触发N次效果（如随机魔弹）。通常设置为1.0。
desc.en: At the end of the turn, triggers an effect N times based on the number of turns taken. Usually set to 1.0.

title.zh: 回合结束时获得动能尖刺
title.en: Gain Kinetic Spikes at Turn End

desc.zh: 每回合结束时获得的动能尖刺层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Number of Kinetic Spikes stacks gained at the end of each turn. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 元素法力消耗降低：元素

desc.zh: 指定哪些元素的法术可以享受法力消耗降低。可以是单个元素或数组。
desc.en: Specifies which elemental spells receive a mana cost reduction. Can be a single element or an array.

title.zh: 元素法力消耗降低：数值

desc.zh: 降低指定元素法术的法力消耗。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Reduces the mana cost of specified elemental spells. Seen value: 2.0.

title.zh: 友军耗蓝时获得一次性法伤
title.en: Gain One-Use Spell Damage on Ally Mana Spend

desc.zh: 当友军消耗法力时，你下一次法术获得的伤害加成。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Damage bonus for your next spell when an ally spends mana. Seen value: 2.0.

title.en: Gain Mana on Ally Mana Spend

desc.zh: 当友军消耗法力时，你获得的法力值。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Mana gained when an ally spends mana. Seen value: 2.0.

title.zh: 精确法力触发：临时状态

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的临时状态的名称。参考值：'KineticSpikes', 'DamageUp'。
desc.en: The name of the temporary status gained when conditions are met. Seen values: 'KineticSpikes', 'DamageUp'.

title.zh: 精确法力触发：临时层数

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的临时状态的层数。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: The number of temporary status stacks gained when conditions are met. Seen value: 5.0.

title.zh: 精确法力触发：持续回合

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的临时状态的持续回合数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: The duration in turns for the temporary status gained. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 精确法力触发：回合末失效
title.en: Exact Mana Trigger: Expires on End Turn

desc.zh: 设置临时状态是否在你的回合结束时失效。通常设置为 true。
desc.en: Determines if the temporary status expires at the end of your turn. Usually set to true.

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的护盾值。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: Shield value gained when the condition is met. Seen value: 5.0.

title.zh: 精确法力触发：生命恢复

desc.zh: 满足条件时，恢复的生命值。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: Health restored when the condition is met. Seen value: 5.0.

title.zh: 友军法力恢复光环：层数

desc.zh: 为友军提供的法力恢复量。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Amount of mana regeneration provided to allies. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 友军法力恢复光环：范围

desc.zh: 光环的范围。通常是'global'。
desc.en: The range of the aura. Usually 'global'.

desc.zh: 友军需要消耗的最低法力值才能触发效果。参考值：7.0。
desc.en: The minimum mana an ally must spend to trigger the effect. Seen value: 7.0.

title.zh: 友军耗蓝触发：全属性提升
title.en: Ally Mana Spend Trigger: All Stats Up

desc.zh: 友军满足耗蓝条件时，为其提供的全属性提升。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: All stats up bonus granted to an ally when they meet the mana spend condition. Seen value: 1.0.

title.en: Mana Gain for Allies on Cast

desc.zh: 当你消耗法力时，为每个友军恢复的法力值。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Mana restored to each ally when you spend mana. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 回合结束施法N次触发：次数
title.en: Trigger on Turn End if Cast N Spells: Count

desc.zh: 回合结束时，需要精确施放的法术次数才能触发效果。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: The exact number of spells that must be cast to trigger the effect at turn end. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

title.zh: 回合结束施法N次触发：双重施法
title.en: Trigger on Turn End if Cast N Spells: Double Cast

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的双重施法次数。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Number of double casts gained when the condition is met. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

title.zh: 精确法力触发：智力提升

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的智力点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Intelligence points gained when the condition is met. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 精确法力触发：动能尖刺

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的动能尖刺层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Kinetic Spikes stacks gained when the condition is met. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 精确法力触发：神圣护盾

desc.zh: 满足条件时，获得的神圣护盾层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Divine Shield stacks gained when the condition is met. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 将你的生命再生效果分享给所有友军。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Shares your health regeneration effect with all allies. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 使所有友军的生命值可以超过上限。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows all allies' HP to exceed their maximum. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 增加你所有治疗技能的治疗量。参考值：2.0, 4.0。
desc.en: Increases the amount of healing done by all your healing abilities. Seen values: 2.0, 4.0.

desc.zh: 在战斗开始时恢复生命。输入一个带%的字符串，如'100%'。
desc.en: Restores health at the start of battle. Input as a string with '%', e.g., '100%'.

desc.zh: 使你的治疗技能可以对敌人造成伤害。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: Allows your healing abilities to damage enemies. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 增加指向地块的治疗法术的施法距离。参考值：2.0。
desc.en: Increases the cast range of tile-targeted healing spells. Seen value: 2.0.

desc.zh: 为你造成的神圣伤害提供一个额外的乘数。1.0代表伤害翻倍。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Provides an additional multiplier for Holy damage you deal. 1.0 means double damage. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 当你治疗一个单位时，也为其恢复法力。可以是固定数值或百分比字符串。参考值：2.0, '50%'。
desc.en: When you heal a unit, also restore its mana. Can be a fixed number or a percentage string. Seen values: 2.0, '50%'.

desc.zh: 当你对一个单位造成过量治疗时，你和目标都获得护盾。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: When you overheal a unit, both you and the target gain a shield. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

desc.zh: 当你拾取一个非金币物品时，所有友军也获得其效果。通常设置为1.0来启用。
desc.en: When you pick up a non-coin item, all allies also gain its effects. Typically set to 1.0 to enable.

desc.zh: 当你治疗其他单位时，为自己恢复一定比例的治疗量。输入一个带%的字符串。参考值：'50%', '100%'。
desc.en: When you heal another unit, you heal yourself for a percentage of that amount. Input as a string with '%'. Seen values: '50%', '100%'.

title.zh: 击杀时为友军加全属性
title.en: All Stats Up for Allies on Kill

desc.zh: 当你击杀一个单位时，为所有友军提供全属性提升。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: When you kill a unit, grant all allies an All Stats Up buff. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 击杀单位时，刷新你的基础攻击次数。通常设置为1.0。
desc.en: Refreshes your basic attack uses when you kill a unit. Usually set to 1.0.

desc.zh: 当你进行治疗时，获得的速度点数。参考值：2.0, 4.0。
desc.en: Speed points gained when you perform a heal. Seen values: 2.0, 4.0.

desc.zh: 当你进行治疗时，获得的随机属性点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Random stat points gained when you perform a heal. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 击杀敌人时获得神圣护盾
title.en: Gain Divine Shield on Enemy Kill

desc.zh: 击杀一个敌人时获得的神圣护盾层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Number of Divine Shield stacks gained when killing an enemy. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 击杀敌人时刷新移动点
title.en: Refresh Move Points on Enemy Kill

desc.zh: 击杀一个敌人时，刷新你的移动次数。通常设置为1.0。
desc.en: Refreshes your movement uses when you kill an enemy. Usually set to 1.0.

desc.zh: 使你的治疗技能可以复活被击倒的单位。数值是复活后恢复生命值的倍率。参考值：1.0, 3.0。
desc.en: Allows your healing abilities to revive downed units. The value is a multiplier for health restored on revival. Seen values: 1.0, 3.0.

desc.zh: 当一个敌人击倒任何单位时，对其造成的神圣伤害。参考值：10.0。
desc.en: Holy damage dealt to an enemy when it downs any unit. Seen value: 10.0.

desc.zh: 惩击时附加的眩晕层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Stun stacks applied on smite. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 从敌人身上打出拾取物

desc.zh: 当敌人受到技能伤害时，掉落的随机拾取物数量。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Number of random pickups dropped when an enemy takes ability damage. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

title.zh: 杀戮前祝福：神圣伤害倍率

desc.zh: 在你造成首次击杀前，神圣伤害的倍率。参考值：2.0, 3.0。
desc.en: Multiplier for Holy damage before you get your first kill. Seen values: 2.0, 3.0.

desc.zh: 在你造成首次击杀前，神圣伤害附加的燃烧层数。参考值：2.0, 3.0。
desc.en: Burn stacks applied by Holy damage before you get your first kill. Seen values: 2.0, 3.0.

title.zh: 获得金币时友军状态(缩放)

desc.zh: 设置友军获得的状态是否根据金币数量缩放。通常设置为 true。
desc.en: Determines if the status gained by allies scales with the number of coins. Usually set to true.

title.zh: 获得金币时友军获得幸运
title.en: Allies Gain Luck on Coin Gain

desc.zh: 当你获得金币时，友军获得的幸运点数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Luck points gained by allies when you gain coins. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 获得金币时友军恢复生命

desc.zh: 当你获得金币时，友军恢复的生命值。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Health restored to allies when you gain coins. Seen value: 1.0.

title.zh: 获得金币时获得神圣护盾
title.en: Gain Divine Shield on Coin Gain

desc.zh: 当你获得金币时，获得的神圣护盾层数。参考值：1.0。
desc.en: Number of Divine Shield stacks gained when you gain coins. Seen value: 1.0.

desc.zh: 当普攻目标是友军时，为其净化负面效果。通常设置为0.0。
desc.en: When the basic attack target is an ally, cleanse their debuffs. Usually set to 0.0.

title.zh: 普攻(对友军)：全属性提升(几率)
title.en: Basic Attack (on Ally): All Stats Up (Chance)

desc.zh: 当普攻目标是友军时，有几率提供全属性提升。可以是一个[层数, 几率]的数组。参考值：[1.0, 0.5]。
desc.en: When the basic attack target is an ally, chance to grant All Stats Up. Can be a [stacks, chance] array. Seen value: [1.0, 0.5].

desc.zh: 当普攻目标是敌人时，为其施加混乱。参考值：2.0, 3.0。
desc.en: When the basic attack target is an enemy, apply Confusion. Seen values: 2.0, 3.0.

desc.zh: 当普攻目标是敌人时，有几率施加眩晕。可以是一个[层数, 几率]的数组。参考值：[1.0, 0.5]。
desc.en: When the basic attack target is an enemy, chance to apply Stun. Can be a [stacks, chance] array. Seen value: [1.0, 0.5].

desc.zh: 当普攻目标是友军时，为其提供护盾。参考值：2.0, 3.0。
desc.en: When the basic attack target is an ally, grant them a shield. Seen values: 2.0, 3.0.

title.zh: 低血量友军闪避光环：阈值
title.en: Low Health Ally Dodge Aura: Threshold

desc.zh: 友军生命值低于此数值时，会获得闪避加成。参考值：5.0。
desc.en: Allies below this health value gain a dodge bonus. Seen value: 5.0.

title.zh: 低血量友军闪避光环：几率
title.en: Low Health Ally Dodge Aura: Chance

desc.zh: 为低血量友军提供的闪避几率。输入一个带%的字符串。参考值：'50%'。
desc.en: Dodge chance provided to low-health allies. Input as a string with '%'. Seen value: '50%'.

desc.zh: 每轮结束时自动施放的能力ID。参考值：'MedicObey', 'MedicObey2'。
desc.en: The ID of the ability to autocast at the end of each round. Seen values: 'MedicObey', 'MedicObey2'.

title.zh: 每轮自动施法：强制显示名称
title.en: Autocast Each Round: Force Display Name

desc.zh: 是否在界面上强制显示该自动施法能力的名称。通常设置为 true。
desc.en: Whether to force display the name of this autocast ability in the UI. Usually set to true.

desc.zh: 为你装备的饰品的被动效果提供一个额外的乘数。1.0代表效果翻倍。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Provides an additional multiplier for the passive effects of your equipped trinket. 1.0 means double effect. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

desc.zh: 为你装备的饰品的主动效果提供一个额外的乘数。1.0代表效果翻倍。参考值：1.0, 2.0。
desc.en: Provides an additional multiplier for the active effects of your equipped trinket. 1.0 means double effect. Seen values: 1.0, 2.0.

title.zh: 施法前祝福：每回合治疗量

desc.zh: 在施法前，每回合为友军恢复的生命值。参考值：2.0, 3.0。
desc.en: Health restored to allies each turn before casting a spell. Seen values: 2.0, 3.0.

title.zh: 施法前祝福：每回合回蓝

desc.zh: 在施法前，每回合为友军恢复的法力值。参考值：2.0, 3.0。
desc.en: Mana restored to allies each turn before casting a spell. Seen values: 2.0, 3.0.

title.zh: 施法前祝福：友军随机属性

desc.zh: 在施法前，每回合为友军提供的随机属性点数。参考值：3.0。
desc.en: Random stat points granted to allies each turn before casting a spell. Seen value: 3.0.
